sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check the current position and see if any targets are now being overlapped by the cross. I should also check if any targets have been collected already.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
white_pos = None
blue_targets = []
gray_squares = []

for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        white_pos = n['boundary'][0]
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 1:
        blue_targets.append((n['id'], n['boundary'][0]))
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        gray_squares.append((n['id'], n['boundary'], n['children']))

print(f"White dot at: {white_pos}")
print(f"Blue targets remaining: {len(blue_targets)}")
for tid, tpos in blue_targets:
    print(f"  Target {tid} at {tpos}")
print(f"Gray squares: {len(gray_squares)}")

# Check cross dimensions
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 13:
        print(f"Blue cross arm {n['id']}: boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
